auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: Dialpad WFM API access token sent as a Bearer token. Request it from your Dialpad WFM customer success manager as described in the official API docs: https://help.dialpad.com/docs/wfm-apis

actions.name: get_schedule
actions.description: Retrieve one page of Dialpad WFM schedule entries for an RFC 3339 time interval.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval in RFC 3339 format.

end.description: End of the reporting interval in RFC 3339 format.

includeDeletedAgents.description: Whether to include deleted agent schedules. Dialpad WFM defaults this to true.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of schedule entries to return in one response. Dialpad WFM defaults to 100.

pageAfter.description: Schedule pagination cursor from the links.next URL in a previous response.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination options for retrieving Dialpad WFM schedule entries.

data.description: The schedule entries returned for this page.

self.description: The URL of this page of schedule results.

anyOf.description: The URL of the next page of schedule results, or null when there are no more pages.

outputSchema.description: One page of Dialpad WFM schedule entries.

actions.name: list_activity_metrics
actions.description: Retrieve one cursor page of Dialpad WFM activity metrics for an RFC 3339 interval.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval in RFC 3339 format.

end.description: End of the reporting interval in RFC 3339 format.

emails.description: Comma-separated agent email addresses to filter by.

includeDeletedAgents.description: Whether to include deleted agents in the response.

limit.description: Maximum number of metric records to return. Dialpad WFM defaults to 500 and caps the value at 500.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous Dialpad WFM response.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination options for Dialpad WFM activity metrics.

items.description: One raw Dialpad WFM activity metric record.
The metric records returned for this page.

anyOf.description: The pagination cursor for the next page, or null when there are no more results.

outputSchema.description: One page of Dialpad WFM activity metric records.

actions.name: list_agent_metrics
actions.description: Retrieve one cursor page of Dialpad WFM agent metrics for an RFC 3339 interval.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval in RFC 3339 format.

end.description: End of the reporting interval in RFC 3339 format.

emails.description: Comma-separated agent email addresses to filter by.

includeDeletedAgents.description: Whether to include deleted agents in the response.

limit.description: Maximum number of metric records to return. Dialpad WFM defaults to 500 and caps the value at 500.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous Dialpad WFM response.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination options for Dialpad WFM agent metrics.

items.description: One raw Dialpad WFM agent metric record.
The metric records returned for this page.

anyOf.description: The pagination cursor for the next page, or null when there are no more results.

outputSchema.description: One page of Dialpad WFM agent metric records.
